services.title: Web Application Penetration Testing
services.description: Comprehensive black-box or grey-box penetration testing of your web application. Covers OWASP Top 10, business logic flaws, authentication issues, and infrastructure misconfigurations.

services.title: Security Code Review
services.description: Manual review of your application's codebase to identify security vulnerabilities before they reach production. Supports JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, and Node.js codebases.

services.title: Full-Stack Web Development
services.description: Security-first web application development. Building performant, scalable, and secure web apps using modern JavaScript stack with AstroJS, React, or Next.js on the frontend and Cloudflare Workers or Node.js on the backend.

services.title: Security Consultation
services.description: One-on-one consultation session to discuss your application's security posture, threat model, or specific security concerns. Ideal for startups and small teams.
